title: Saudi Arabia’s life expectancy rises to nearly 80 years, up from 74 in 2016
summary_full: Saudi Arabia's life expectancy has risen to 79.9 years, nearing its Vision 2030 goal. This progress is attributed to a significant expansion in clinical trials, which grew by 51.4% between 2023 and 2025, speeding up access to new treatments and enhancing research impact.
